content: Backend: Add /api/sandbox/vscode/provision endpoint (fast init + background task)
Backend: Add attach endpoint to link provision to project
Frontend: Rework CostPreviewModal with real E2B steps (no fake setTimeout)
Frontend: Pass provisionId to AppBuilder to attach to project after creation
Fix: Add EMERGENT_LLM_KEY to enable code generation
Testing: E2E test of the full parallel flow
